title: croton tumbesinus
intro: Croton tumbesinus, also known as the Yellow Trumpetbush or Yellow Croton, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and attractive foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton tumbesinus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Croton tumbesinus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
